about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Raghad AI is your trusted luxury lifestyle companion — blending intelligent guidance with elegant, practical recommendations.
about.introBody: Askraghadai.com helps modern users discover fashion, beauty, skincare, home, kids essentials, and travel ideas with confidence. We combine carefully curated knowledge with AI so every conversation feels personal, clear, and useful.
about.missionBody: To empower every user with personalized AI guidance, trusted partner offers, and polished bilingual content — so decisions feel easier, smarter, and more refined.
about.valuesBody: Clarity over clutter. Trust over noise. Luxury that feels practical. We design every answer and recommendation to support confident choices in everyday life.
about.contentNote: Content is updated periodically to ensure the best recommendations.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.subtitle: A smarter, more elegant way to discover lifestyle recommendations.
vision.leadBody: We envision Raghad AI as a leading smart advisor — a place where Arabic and English speakers receive polished, trustworthy guidance for fashion, beauty, travel, and modern living.
vision.futureBody: Our vision is an assistant that understands individual taste, recommends with care, and connects users to verified offers without confusion. From fashion to itineraries, every interaction should feel calm, premium, and useful.
vision.promiseBody: We will keep improving our knowledge, partnerships, and tools so Raghad AI remains a reliable companion for confident choices — today and as the platform grows.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Raghad AI

items.a: Raghad AI is your intelligent luxury lifestyle advisor. It gives personalized recommendations across fashion, beauty, skincare, home, kids' essentials, and smart travel planning.

items.q: How does the AI give recommendations?
items.a: It combines a curated knowledge base with advanced AI to answer your questions directly in chat — including product advice, skincare routines, and complete travel itineraries tailored to your needs.

items.q: Can I search using my voice or a photo?
items.a: Yes. Use the microphone to search by voice, or the camera and upload icons to search with an image. The assistant analyses your photo and suggests suitable options.
Raghad AI supports Arabic and English, with a global lifestyle focus — fashion, beauty, home, kids, and travel advice tailored to your language preference.
Recommendations appear as clean product cards with trusted store links and discount codes from our verified affiliate partners — no raw links, ever.

footer.note: Content is updated periodically to ensure the best recommendations.
